questions.question: Who are the members of India's recurve men's archery team that won a silver medal in the World Cup Stage 1, 2025?
questions.option_1: Dhiraj Bommadevara, Atanu Das and Tarundeep Rai
questions.option_2: Dhiraj Bommadevara, Abhishek Verma and Atanu Das
questions.option_3: Atanu Das, Abhishek Verma and Tarundeep Rai
questions.option_4: Tarundeep Rai, Jayanta Talukdar and Rahul Banerjee
